dvids.title: USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) Conducts a Replenishment-at-Sea
dvids.desc: Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) conducts a replenishment-at-sea while transiting the Arabian Sea, May 18, 2026. (U.S. Navy Video)

dvids.title: Military Leaders Testify to House on Posture in Middle East, Africa
dvids.desc: Daniel Zimmerman, assistant secretary of war for international security affairs; Navy Adm. Brad Cooper, commander of U.S. Central Command; and Air Force Gen. Dagvin R.M. Anderson, commander of U.S. Africa Command, testify on the military’s policies, programs and activities in the Middle East and Afr

dvids.title: U.S. Navy Sailors conduct flight operations aboard USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77)
dvids.desc: U.S. Navy Sailors conduct flight operations aboard USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) while deployed to the U.S. 5th Fleet area of operations, supporting maritime security, regional stability, and freedom of navigation throughout the Middle East.

dvids.title: Inside Trojan Footprint 2026 with Lt. Gen. Richard E. Angle
dvids.desc: U.S. Army Lt. Gen. Richard E. Angle, commanding general of U.S. Special Operations Command Europe, discusses the importance of multinational interoperability and special operations readiness during Trojan Footprint 2026.
